DASHBOARD.SUBTITLE: Here is your ERP system overview. Navigate to the modules you have access to.

CARDS.USERS_DESC: Manage system users and their accounts
CARDS.MASTER_LOOKUPS_DESC: Manage reference data and lookup tables

AUTH.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

PAGES.TITLE: Pages Management
PAGES.PAGE_CODE_READONLY_HINT: Page code cannot be changed after creation
PAGES.SELECT_PAGE_TO_VIEW: Select a Page to View Details
PAGES.SELECT_PAGE_HINT: Click on any page from the list on the left to view and edit its details
PAGES.CONFIRM_DEACTIVATE_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to deactivate page '{{pageCode}}'?
PAGES.CONFIRM_ACTIVATE_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to activate page '{{pageCode}}'?

MASTER_LOOKUPS.TITLE: Master Lookups
MASTER_LOOKUPS.LOOKUP_KEY_READONLY_HINT: Lookup key cannot be changed after creation
MASTER_LOOKUPS.ADD_DETAIL_HINT: Click 'Add Detail' to add lookup values
MASTER_LOOKUPS.CODE_READONLY_HINT: Code cannot be changed after creation
MASTER_LOOKUPS.CONFIRM_DELETE_LOOKUP: Are you sure you want to delete this lookup?
MASTER_LOOKUPS.CONFIRM_DELETE_DETAIL: Are you sure you want to delete this detail?
MASTER_LOOKUPS.USAGE_WARNING: This lookup is in use and cannot be deleted. Usages: {{count}}
MASTER_LOOKUPS.CONFIRM_DELETE: Are you sure you want to delete the lookup '{{lookupKey}}'?
MASTER_LOOKUPS.CONFIRM_ACTIVATE: Are you sure you want to activate the lookup '{{lookupKey}}'?
MASTER_LOOKUPS.CONFIRM_DEACTIVATE: Are you sure you want to deactivate the lookup '{{lookupKey}}'?
MASTER_LOOKUPS.CONFIRM_ACTIVATE_DETAIL: Are you sure you want to activate detail '{{code}}'?
MASTER_LOOKUPS.CONFIRM_DEACTIVATE_DETAIL: Are you sure you want to deactivate detail '{{code}}'?
MASTER_LOOKUPS.CANNOT_DELETE_HAS_DETAILS: This lookup cannot be deleted because it has details. Please remove all details first.
MASTER_LOOKUPS.SAVE_BEFORE_ADDING_DETAILS: Please save the lookup first before adding details

USERS.TITLE: User Management
USERS.TENANT_HINT: The tenant ID the user belongs to (optional)
USERS.ACTIVE_HINT: Check if the user is active or not
USERS.NO_PERMISSION_ADD: You don't have permission to add a user
USERS.NO_PERMISSION_EDIT: You don't have permission to edit a user
USERS.NO_PERMISSION_DELETE: You don't have permission to delete a user
USERS.NO_PERMISSION_ROLES: You don't have permission to manage roles
USERS.PASSWORD_HINT_EDIT: Leave blank to keep current password
USERS.PASSWORD_HINT_CREATE: Password must be at least 6 characters
USERS.NO_ROLES_AVAILABLE: No roles available. Please check your connection or contact administrator.
USERS.NO_ROLES_FOUND: No roles found matching your search
USERS.CLICK_TO_SELECT_ROLES: Click Manage Roles button to select roles
USERS.SHUTTLE_HINT: Click on roles to select them, then use arrow buttons to move between lists. Use search boxes to quickly find roles.
USERS.SELECT_ROLES_HINT: Click to select roles from the available list and move them to selected
USERS.CONFIRM_DELETE:
Are you sure you want to delete user "{{username}}"?

Note: This action cannot be undone.
USERS.USERNAME_MIN_LENGTH: Username must be at least 3 characters
USERS.PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: Password must be at least 6 characters

ROLE_ACCESS.TITLE: Role Access Control
ROLE_ACCESS.SUBTITLE: Manage role permissions and page access
ROLE_ACCESS.SELECT_ROLE_HINT: Select a role to view and manage its permissions
ROLE_ACCESS.DELETE_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete the role "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
ROLE_ACCESS.NO_PAGES_ASSIGNED: No pages assigned to this role
ROLE_ACCESS.ADD_PAGE_HINT: Click "Add Page" to assign pages to this role
ROLE_ACCESS.COPY_PERMISSIONS_DESC: Select a role to copy its page permissions. This will replace current permissions.

GL.ORG_READONLY_HINT: Organization cannot be changed after creation
GL.TREE_EMPTY_HINT: No accounts found. Use the 'Add Root Account' button to create your first account, or apply advanced filters to refine results.
GL.ACCOUNT_CODE_AUTO_HINT: Account code is automatically generated based on the hierarchical structure.
GL.PARENT_ACCOUNT_HINT: Select a parent account to create a child account, or leave empty for a root account.
GL.CONFIRM_DEACTIVATE_ACCOUNT: Are you sure you want to deactivate account "{{name}}"?
GL.PARENT_CHANGE_WARNING: Changing the parent account may affect the hierarchy and account numbering. Are you sure you want to proceed?
GL.MAKE_ROOT_WARNING: Removing the parent will make this a root account. This may affect the hierarchy and account numbering. Are you sure?
GL.ACCOUNT_TYPE_CHANGE_WARNING: Changing the account type may affect child accounts under this hierarchy. Proceed with caution.
GL.CONFIRM_DEACTIVATE_PARENT_ACCOUNT: Account "{{name}}" ({{code}}) may have child accounts. Deactivating a parent account can affect its entire sub-tree. Are you sure you want to proceed?
GL.DELETE_HAS_CHILDREN: Cannot deactivate an account that has child accounts. Remove or move child accounts first.
GL.CANNOT_DEACTIVATE_WITH_ACTIVE_CHILDREN: Cannot deactivate this account because it has active child accounts. Deactivate all child accounts first.
GL.CONFIRM_ACTIVATE_ACCOUNT: Are you sure you want to activate account "{{name}}"?
GL.TYPE_LOCKED_HAS_CHILDREN: Account type cannot be changed because this account has child accounts.
GL.NO_LINES: No lines added. Click "Add Line" to add a rule line.
GL.MIN_ONE_LINE: At least one rule line is required
GL.RULE_FORM_INVALID: The rule cannot be saved yet. Complete the missing inputs below.
GL.DEBIT_LINE_REQUIRED: Add at least one debit rule line.
GL.CREDIT_LINE_REQUIRED: Add at least one credit rule line.
GL.CONFIRM_DEACTIVATE_RULE: Are you sure you want to deactivate rule #{{ruleId}}?
GL.JOURNAL_NOT_BALANCED: Journal is not balanced. Total Debit must equal Total Credit.
GL.JOURNAL_ADD_LINE_HINT: Click 'Add Line' to add a journal line.
GL.CONFIRM_DEACTIVATE_JOURNAL: Are you sure you want to deactivate journal "{{journalNo}}"?
GL.CONFIRM_APPROVE_JOURNAL: Are you sure you want to approve journal "{{journalNo}}"?
GL.CONFIRM_POST_JOURNAL: Are you sure you want to post journal "{{journalNo}}"? This action cannot be undone easily.
GL.CONFIRM_REVERSE_JOURNAL: Are you sure you want to reverse journal "{{journalNo}}"? A reversal journal entry will be created.
GL.CONFIRM_CANCEL_JOURNAL: Are you sure you want to cancel journal "{{journalNo}}"?
GL.CONFIRM_GENERATE_JOURNAL: Are you sure you want to generate a journal entry from this posting?
GL.JOURNAL_ALREADY_EXISTS: A journal already exists for this posting
GL.JOURNAL_BALANCED: The journal is balanced — Debit equals Credit.
GL.JOURNAL_NOT_BALANCED: The journal is NOT balanced — Debit does not equal Credit. Generation is blocked.
GL.JOURNAL_PREVIEW_WARNING: This action will create an automatic journal entry. Once generated, this journal cannot be edited and the posting status will change to JOURNAL_CREATED.
GL.NO_POSTING_DETAILS_MSG: This posting has no detail lines.

VALIDATION.PATTERN_UPPERCASE_ALPHANUMERIC: Must start with uppercase letter and contain only A-Z, 0-9, _
VALIDATION.PATTERN_ROUTE: Must start with / and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens

ERRORS.NETWORK_ERROR: Network connection error. Please check your internet connection.
ERRORS.TIMEOUT: Request timed out. Please try again.
ERRORS.CONNECTION_REFUSED: Unable to connect to the server. Please try again later.
ERRORS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.
ERRORS.BAD_REQUEST: Invalid request. Please check your input.
ERRORS.CONFLICT: A conflict occurred. The resource may have been modified.
ERRORS.BAD_GATEWAY: Server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
ERRORS.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
ERRORS.GATEWAY_TIMEOUT: Server response timeout. Please try again.
ERRORS.VALIDATION_FAILED: Validation failed. Please check your input.
ERRORS.USERNAME_EXISTS: Username already exists. Please choose a different username.
ERRORS.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
ERRORS.INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS: You do not have permission to perform this action.
ERRORS.ENTITY_NOT_FOUND: The requested item was not found.
ERRORS.ENTITY_IN_USE: This item is currently in use and cannot be deleted.
ERRORS.OPERATION_FAILED: The operation failed. Please try again.
ERRORS.STATE_CONFLICT: The operation could not be completed due to a state conflict.
ERRORS.MASTER_LOOKUP_KEY_DUPLICATE: A master lookup with this key already exists.
ERRORS.MASTER_LOOKUP_ACTIVE_DETAILS_EXIST: Cannot deactivate master lookup. It has active details.
ERRORS.MASTER_LOOKUP_DETAILS_EXIST: Cannot delete master lookup. It still has details.
ERRORS.MASTER_LOOKUP_FK_VIOLATION: Cannot delete master lookup because it is in use.
ERRORS.LOOKUP_VALUE_INVALID: Lookup value is invalid or inactive.
ERRORS.LOOKUP_DETAIL_CODE_DUPLICATE: A detail with this code already exists in the lookup.
ERRORS.LOOKUP_DETAIL_FK_VIOLATION: Cannot delete lookup detail because it is referenced by other records.
ERRORS.ACTIVITY_REFERENCES_EXIST: Cannot delete lookup detail. It is referenced by activities.
ERRORS.USER_HAS_ACTIVE_REFRESH_TOKENS: Cannot delete user. User has active sessions.
ERRORS.USER_HAS_DEPENDENCIES: Cannot delete user. User has associated data.
ERRORS.ROLE_ALREADY_EXISTS: A role with this name already exists.
ERRORS.PERMISSION_NOT_ASSIGNED: Permission is not assigned to this role.
ERRORS.PERMISSIONS_NOT_FOUND: One or more permissions were not found.
ERRORS.CANNOT_REMOVE_VIEW_PERMISSION: Cannot remove view permission while other permissions exist.
ERRORS.PAGE_ALREADY_ASSIGNED: This page is already assigned to the role.
ERRORS.PAGE_NOT_ASSIGNED: This page is not assigned to the role.
ERRORS.NO_PERMISSIONS_TO_COPY: The source role has no permissions to copy.
ERRORS.DB_CONSTRAINT_VIOLATION: Cannot complete operation due to data constraints.
ERRORS.GL_DUPLICATE_ACCOUNT_CODE: Account code already exists in this organization.
ERRORS.GL_ACCOUNT_IN_USE: Account is in use and cannot be modified.
ERRORS.GL_ACCOUNT_HAS_CHILDREN: Cannot deactivate account. It has active child accounts.
ERRORS.GL_ACCOUNT_IN_ACTIVE_RULE: Account is used in active accounting rules and cannot be deactivated.
ERRORS.GL_ACCOUNT_HAS_BALANCE: Account has a non-zero balance and cannot be deactivated.
ERRORS.GL_ACCOUNT_ORG_LOCKED: Organization cannot be changed after account creation.
ERRORS.GL_ACCOUNT_NOT_LEAF: Account is not a leaf account. Only leaf accounts are eligible for posting.
ERRORS.GL_INACTIVE_ACCOUNT: Account is inactive and cannot be used in rule lines.
ERRORS.GL_ACCOUNT_CIRCULAR_REF: Circular reference detected in account hierarchy.
ERRORS.GL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_MISMATCH: Account type does not match parent account type.
ERRORS.GL_ACCOUNT_PARENT_INACTIVE: Parent account is inactive. Parent must be active.
ERRORS.GL_ACCOUNT_SELF_REFERENCE: Account cannot be its own parent.
ERRORS.GL_ACCOUNT_DESCENDANT_AS_PARENT: Cannot set a descendant account as parent (would create circular hierarchy).
ERRORS.GL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CHANGE_WITH_CHILDREN: Cannot change account type when account has children.
ERRORS.GL_ACCOUNT_NO_MANUAL_OVERRIDE: Account number is auto-generated and cannot be manually set.
ERRORS.GL_DUPLICATE_ACTIVE_RULE: An active rule already exists for this company, module, and document type combination.
ERRORS.GL_RULE_IN_USE: Accounting rule is used in completed postings and cannot be modified.
ERRORS.GL_RULE_HAS_PENDING_POSTINGS: Cannot deactivate rule. It has pending postings.
ERRORS.GL_UNBALANCED_ENTRY: Accounting rule cannot produce a balanced journal entry.
ERRORS.GL_MISSING_RULE: No active accounting rule found for the specified combination.
ERRORS.GL_RULE_NO_LINES: Accounting rule must contain at least one line.
ERRORS.GL_RULE_MISSING_SIDES: Accounting rule must contain lines on both DEBIT and CREDIT sides.
ERRORS.GL_RULE_DUPLICATE_PRIORITY: Duplicate priority within the same rule. Priority must be unique.
ERRORS.GL_RULE_INVALID_ENTRY_SIDE: Entry side must be DEBIT or CREDIT.
ERRORS.GL_RULE_INVALID_AMOUNT_SOURCE_TYPE: Amount source type must be TOTAL, FIXED, or PERCENT.
ERRORS.GL_RULE_INVALID_PRIORITY: Priority must be a positive integer.
ERRORS.GL_RULE_INVALID_SOURCE_MODULE: Invalid source module. Please select a valid module.
ERRORS.GL_RULE_INVALID_SOURCE_DOC_TYPE: Invalid source document type. Please select a valid document type.
ERRORS.GL_RULE_AMOUNT_TOTAL_NO_VALUE: Amount source value must be empty when amount source type is TOTAL.
ERRORS.GL_RULE_AMOUNT_FIXED_POSITIVE: Amount source value must be greater than zero when amount source type is FIXED.
ERRORS.GL_RULE_AMOUNT_PERCENT_RANGE: Amount source value must be between 0 and 1 (exclusive) when amount source type is PERCENT.
ERRORS.GL_VALIDATION_ERROR: GL validation error. Please check your input.

MESSAGES.UNSAVED_CHANGES: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to continue?
